Free Vape 3D Models

Explore high-quality Vape 3D models with Meshy, including popular designs. Download free Vape 3D models in STL, 3MF, FBX, GLB, OBJ, and USDZ formats for 3D printing, game development, animation, AR/VR, and digital projects. Optimized for Blender, Unity, and Unreal Engine.

Need something custom? Use Meshy's AI to create your own Vape 3D models from text or images — fast, free, and ready to use.

  • Formats: .STL, .OBJ, .FBX, .GLB…
  • Compatible with: Blender, Unity, Unreal Engine, Maya
  • License: Free for Commercial Use
  • Styles: Realistic, Low Poly, Stylized, Voxel

5 months ago

A small rectangular vape device with rounded edges and a glossy finish. The front face is mostly black with a smooth gradient transitioning to purple on the upper left and turquoise on the lower left. The top has a compact, semi-transparent purple mouthpiece with a soft plastic appearance. The body has the word “meloso” printed in white on the front. The design should appear sleek, modern, and minimalistic, with subtle reflections to emphasize the shiny surface. Render the model floating above a white background with soft shadow underneath.

Vape Cartridge on Black

Image to 3D
5 months ago

A sleek, cylindrical personal vaporizing device with a deep, metallic red body and a smooth, slightly matte finish. Its main column is a uniform tube, subtly tapering towards the top. A contrasting black, ergonomically shaped mouthpiece flares slightly at the top, made of a smooth plastic. A small, rectangular black button is subtly integrated on one side, and the base is a rounded black cap. The entire object has a clean, minimalist appearance with a firm, solid tactile quality.

Frequently Asked QuestionsFrequentlyAskedQuestions

Yes, all Vape 3D models generated on Meshy are available for free download. We provide high-quality AI-generated assets at no cost.

Absolutely. These Vape assets are released under a CC0 (Creative Commons) license, meaning they are royalty-free and safe for commercial projects without requiring attribution.

You can browse the gallery freely, and creating a free account gives you instant access to download .STL, .OBJ, and .FBX files for any Vape.

Downloads include standard industry formats: .STL (for 3D printing), .FBX (for Game Dev), .OBJ (universal), and .GLB/.USDZ (for AR/VR).

Yes, the .FBX and .OBJ files are fully compatible with Blender, Unity, Unreal Engine, Maya, and Cinema 4D.

Yes, the model includes PBR textures (Albedo, Normal, Roughness) embedded in the .GLB file or available as separate maps for the .OBJ version.

Yes, select the .STL file option for a watertight mesh optimized for 3D printing on FDM or SLA printers (like Prusa or Anycubic).

Depending on the pose, some Vape models may require supports. We recommend using your slicer's (Cura/PrusaSlicer) auto-support feature for complex overhangs.

Our AI generates optimized meshes. This Vape is suitable for real-time rendering in games or mobile AR experiences due to its efficient topology.

This model comes as a static mesh in a standard T-pose or neutral pose, making it easy to auto-rig using tools like Mixamo, AccuRIG, or Blender's Rigify.

Yes, the model features AI-generated automatic UV unwrapping, ensuring textures apply correctly without stretching.

If this model isn't exactly what you need, you can use the Meshy AI Generator to create a custom Vape from text or images in under a minute.

Yes, the topology is clean enough for sculpting or editing in ZBrush or Blender if you need to modify details on the Vape.
